falsification_conditions.condition: S&P 500 closes below 4,150 (2024 August low) on any daily close
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: The bottom_2024_aug pattern match is invalidated because the actual August 2024 low held; breaking below it means this is not a similar bottom formation but rather a breakdown to new lows, making the 78% pattern similarity meaningless

falsification_conditions.condition: VIX closes above 35 for 2 consecutive days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: The blowoff score of 39 suggested controlled fear/early capitulation; sustained VIX above 35 indicates genuine panic rather than the measured bottoming process implied by the pattern, invalidating the 'bottom' call and suggesting deeper drawdown ahead

falsification_conditions.condition: 10Y-2Y Treasury yield curve uninverts and steepens by more than 25 basis points (10Y yield > 2Y yield + 0.25%)
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: The August 2024 bottom occurred with a deeply inverted curve; rapid steepening would signal recession realization rather than soft-landing bottoming, breaking the macro conditions that enabled the 2024 recovery and thus falsifying the pattern analog

doctrine: If you can't list what would prove your call wrong, you don't have a real call.
